chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome to Gate Smashings.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: In today's video, we are going to discuss various types of learnings in AI

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: or you can also say it as various types of machine learnings.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So here if we talk about machine learning, we have different type of learnings

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: which are supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And in many places, these three are asked about difference.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And here in this video, I will give you a very simple level

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: for example, if we talk about PK movie or the exit poll of elections

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then on the basis of those examples, I am going to tell the difference between these three

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and I am going to give their basic introduction here.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So here if we start with supervised learning,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then as we talk about machine learning or artificial intelligence

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then our main aim is how to make machines intelligent.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And the main factor of making any machine intelligent is

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: that it should learn from itself. So here we have three types of learnings

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement. These are the main three learnings

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: we have different types of learnings also. So we are starting with supervised learnings.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: First I am giving you a basic technical introduction.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So here in supervised learning, we have training data.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: What does it mean? It is known as supervised.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Means here we have a supervisor.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Supervisor means a teacher who is giving us some instructions.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Who is training data here?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Training data means we already have input, we have output also available.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And on the basis of that input output, on the basis of that training data

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: or on the basis of that labelled data, we prepare a model

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and in that model, we put new input and check whether the valid output is coming or not.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: What does it mean? If I explain it to you from a simple example

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then exit poll. As you must have seen that many channels had given an exit poll

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: of this Lok Sabha election. So what is the exit poll of Lok Sabha election?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: It is training data. Training data means that from thousands of people

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: from lakhs of people, they took feedback and from different category of people.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: It means that they took it from youngsters, from youngsters also

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and from children also. They took the feedback from elders.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And what is the input in that feedback?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And on the basis of that input, we will get so many seats for BJP

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Congress will get so many seats, this is the winning candidate, this is the losing candidate.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So all these points have already been put into training data.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: And this is our training data basis, we are working on it.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Means we have given this data to the machine.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Now learning algorithms will work here. What learning algorithms are there?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Here we use like a new base algorithm. What is the new base?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: It is working on supervised learning in which you have put your input and output first.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Now what will happen? Now you have given new input. What is the new input here?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: When counting started in actual, the original data, the original people

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: voted, when the data came and what we did with that data?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: On the model, the model which was based on which? The data of exit poll.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: The data of a dummy and the output on the basis of feedback,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: we made the model on the basis of that.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: The model means we made a prototype that this will win, this will lose,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: this will lose, this will have more chances of winning and this will have less chances of losing.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Now what will happen? As soon as we put the new data in it or put the actual data,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: on the basis of that model, it gave some output. Now what is our output?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: If your output is correct there, means what you said in exit poll,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: that is your exact result. So obviously the training data you gave,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: that data gave a very good level of data, gave a very refined data

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and your algorithm is learning properly and classifying.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Classification means that you have to classify the data, that it will win,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: it will lose, it has more chances of winning. So in this way what we do?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: We already provide the machine with input and output. So we call it supervised learning.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: If we talk about unsupervised learning, then it is a simple example,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: if we talk about PK movie. So when Ameer Khan comes from another planet,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then he doesn't know anything, means like Newborn baby, he doesn't have any idea

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: of what is correct, what is wrong, who is a man, who is a woman, who is a child,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: who doesn't know anything. So if you have seen that scene,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then you must know that he doesn't know here how people's hair is.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So he says that someone's hair is glued to someone's neck, someone's hair is colored.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So what is this in actual? He doesn't have any knowledge, he has only input.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Where is the input coming from? From the sensor, means he is looking from the eyes,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he is judging from the eyes, and what is he doing on the basis of his physical structure,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: on the basis of his vision, what is he doing on the basis of his vision, he is doing group,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he is making a cluster there. What does the cluster mean?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He has seen that if someone's moustache, someone's height is good, or someone has worn

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: a white-dressed clothes on the kurta, then that means he has kept it in the category of men,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: means he has kept it in the category of Jains. He has made a category of ladies,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he has made a category of players, he has made a category of children,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: it is not that that category is absolutely right, on a first level, what did he do?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He has made a group, he has made a cluster. So what is this?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: We have only input, not output, he doesn't know what this thing is,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he is slowly learning, he is learning from himself, what is he doing?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He is going towards the actual output. Here we have K-Mean,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: like we use the algorithm, so what do we do in K-Mean clustering?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: We make a group and the same type of people try to keep them in one group.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So this unsupervised learning, mostly machines come in your unsupervised learning

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: because machines have no brains, so obviously what they do?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: We have to give them supervised, they have to give them the first data,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: on the basis of that they generate some output or make some decisions.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So here, if we talk about the third one, reinforcement learning.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: What is reinforcement learning? We have a reward and policy based on it.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Reward and policy means that we have an agent,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: any agent like P.K. Amir Khan is an agent, that agent performed some action,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: where? Environment, the entire environment performed some action in it

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and on the basis of that action, he got either some reward, something in plus or something negative

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: which we can call penalty and state changed something,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: what would be the state change? It changed something in the environment,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: then he made some policy on the basis of that and next time on the basis of that policy

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he will perform it in a different way, meaning you must have seen that scene

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: where he gives a note of Rs. 50, and in return he gets a carrot.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So what does he feel here? As soon as he performed the action,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: he gave a note of Rs. 50, the state changed again and what was the reward?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He gave a bundle of carrots. Now what will happen?

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He thought that he made a policy that the picture of this person

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: wherever it is, take it, so he takes a picture of the person from all places

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and gives it back to that person, as soon as he gives it back, he does not recognize it.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So later on, he gives the biggest message that the value of this photo is not on the paper of only one,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: so what is this actual example? The reinforcement where he is making a policy on the basis of penalty

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: and reward and while changing it in that policy, what is he doing? He learns.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Generally this happens in games. You took a step in games and you got a point.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: You got a point in positive or a point in negative, on the basis of that you will design a policy

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: that next time you have such a step or you should take a similar step or not.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So this is basically an example. You always start from the first unsupervised learning

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: where we don't have any knowledge, we only have input, we don't know anything.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So here he makes some cluster on his basis.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: The cluster can be anything based on their physical structure, their color,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: how they look on the basis of their structure, the cluster will be made on the basis of that.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Then slowly he will refine the clusters.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: He got feedback from other people, slowly he will refine the clusters.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: When the cluster was formed, now as soon as he saw a dress worn, he will know

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: what is this, what is this, what will he put on the side, he will classify it and put it in the group of girls.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Means first while doing unsupervised, he will reach in supervised learning.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: So this is the main difference, supervised, unsupervised and reinforcement.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: We use Q learning method in reinforcement. There are many algorithms.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: But if you implement so many algorithms, you can implement them by using Python,

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: you can implement them on MATLAB and through R programming, you can implement them.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Thank you.

chunks.title: Lec-37： Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning in Artificial Intelligence in Hindi [4dwsSz_fNSQ]
chunks.text: Thank you.
